possibly got totally overhauled?
{{CargoRelic
|name=Bronze Divine Tree
|available=0
|rank=SSS
|affct=FTH
|birthday=07-14
|source=Unknown
|description=
|fame=
|art=
|fth=
|civ=
|tech=
|ss1=
|ss2=
|ss3=
|ss4=
|ss5=
|ss6=
|ss7=
|skill1=
|skill2=
|skill3=
|mirage={{Mirage|name=[Mirage Name]|reward=[Final Reward]
|3name=|3rec=|3atk=|3def=|3hp=|3weak=
|4name=|4rec=|4atk=|4def=|4hp=|4weak=
|5name=|5rec=|5atk=|5def=|5hp=|5weak=
|6name=|6rec=|6atk=|6def=|6hp=|6weak=
|Arec=|Aatk=|Adef=|Ahp=|Aweak=
}}
}}
